heading: General exceptions
label: 300gg–63 General exceptions
notes: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to health insurance coverage offered, sold, issued, renewed, in effect, or operated in the individual market after , regardless of when a period of creditable coverage occurs, see , set out as a note under .June 30, 1997section 111(b) of Pub. children.heading: Exception for certain benefits
children.label: a Exception for certain benefits
children.text: The requirements of this part shall not apply to any health insurance coverage in relation to its provision of excepted benefits described in .section 300gg–91(c)(1) of this title

children.heading: Exception for certain benefits if certain conditions met
children.label: b Exception for certain benefits if certain conditions met
children.text: The requirements of this part shall not apply to any health insurance coverage in relation to its provision of excepted benefits described in paragraph (2), (3), or (4) of if the benefits are provided under a separate policy, certificate, or contract of insurance.section 300gg–91(c) of this title
